justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic update fix proposed with specific SQL example, TOCTOU pattern explicitly named, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) identified as a separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named explicitly in the finding title and confidence areas
Atomic conditional UPDATE with WHERE stock >= $qty proposed as the specific fix
Partial failure between cart insert and stock decrement called out as a separate Critical finding with transaction-based fix
Bonus: identified negative quantity exploit allowing stock inflation — not required but demonstrates thorough analysis
Clear reproduction steps for the race condition with a concrete two-user scenario
Idempotency gap noted as an important issue — good additional coverage
